message:
feat: centralize social image generation and add offline page support

Architectural refactor replacing per-page hardcoded OpenGraph/Twitter metadata
with a centralized, reusable social image generation system, achieving 45%
code reduction while improving maintainability:

Centralized social image system:
- lib/article-social-image.tsx: comprehensive generator (642 lines) with
  6-theme color system, dynamic theme selection by article category, title
  splitting, text truncation, and tag generation for both opengraph (630px)
  and twitter (600px) variants
- lib/project-social-image.tsx: adapter wrapping article-social-image for
  project content, mapping project metadata to article format

Metadata cleanup across all routes:
- Removed redundant openGraph/twitter metadata blocks from layout.tsx files
  across about, consulting, contact, media, nvidia-story, projects, tldr,
  and writing routes — social images now handled by dedicated route files

New dynamic social image routes:
- app/writing/[slug]/{opengraph,twitter}-image.tsx: dynamic per-article images
- app/projects/[slug]/{opengraph,twitter}-image.tsx: dynamic per-project images
- Per-article image routes for bakery_algorithm, barra-factor-model,
  hoeffdings_d_explainer, and cmaes_explainer

Satori compatibility:
- app/tldr/opengraph-image.tsx: replaced dynamic SVG map-based node generation
  with static explicit coordinates for reliable Satori rendering

Offline-first UX:
- app/_offline/: dedicated offline page with custom themed social image
  showing "You're Offline" state (layout, opengraph-image, twitter-image)
- app/offline/: re-export routes with robots noindex/nofollow
- public/sw.js: service worker updates for offline handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
